Home / Services / Blog Setup / Blog Professional

📰 Blog Professional

Take your blog to the next level with our Professional package — designed for bloggers who are serious about growth and monetisation from the start. Everything in Blog Starter plus: a fully custom homepage design (not just a theme — a bespoke layout tailored to your niche and brand), 15 SEO-optimised launch articles with internal linking strategy, email list setup with opt-in forms and a welcome sequence (Mailchimp or ConvertKit), monetisation foundations including affiliate link integration, ad placement zones, and sponsored post templates, a 3-month content calendar with keyword research for your next 30 blog topics, social media profile setup and branded graphics for 2 platforms, and advanced SEO including schema markup, Open Graph tags, and XML sitemap optimisation. This is the package for bloggers who want to treat their blog as a real business from day one.

Service Details

Category: Blog Setup

Credits Price: 1000 credits (approx. £1250)

Turnaround: 10–15 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 10–15 days
Book Blog Professional Now

Related Blog Setup Services

  • Blog Starter — Professional blog setup in your chosen niche with custom theme, essential plugins, and 5 launch posts. (400 credits)
  • Blog Authority — Premium authority blog with 30 posts, full SEO campaign, membership area, and 6-month growth strategy. (2400 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Blog Professional?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 10–15 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
